productDisplayName: Nike Men Barcelona Maroon Blue Jersey
description: CompositionBlue and red striped round neck t-shirt made of Dri-Fit 100% recycled polyester, with yellow ribbed crew neck, yellow sleeve cuffs, appliqued club badge on the left chest, embroidered swoosh logo on the right chest, sponsor logo on the front, LFP patch on the right sleeve, slogan on left sleeve hem and Catalonia flag inspired stripes on the back of the collarFittingRegular  Wash care Machine was cold Wash separately Do not use softeners Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Do not bleach Line dry Do not iron Do not dry clean The 2010/11 FC Barcelona home men's Soccer jersey from nike pays homage to the champs from Catalonia. The FC Barcelona motto, "Mes Que Un Club," appears on the left sleeve of this jersey. The team crest appears on the left chest, and behind it, on the inside is the lettering "Tots Units Fem Forca" which means “United We Are Strong". The stripes on the back neck are inspired by the Catalonia flag, the Senyera. The Dri-FIT keeps you dry and comfortable and the stretch mesh panels down the sides enhance ventilation in high-heat areas.This sweat-wicking Dri-FIT fabric was made from the equivalent of eight recycled plastic bottles thereby the production of this jersey has minimal environmental impact.
